sourceSummary.oneLine: IECEE CB Scheme CB Test Certificate for a rechargeable Li-ion battery model MBP-3S1P3330-HAZ, 3ICP4/60/80.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Evidence that a sample of the rechargeable Li-ion battery was tested and found in conformity with IEC 62133-2:2017 and IEC 62133-2:2017/AMD1:2021 under the IECEE CB Scheme.
keyPoints: Product is identified as Rechargeable Li-ion Battery.
Applicant, manufacturer, and factory are MPLUS ELECTRONICS CO LTD in Icheon-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea.
Test Report Ref. No. C24B017-M0A0 was issued on 2024-09-30.
CB Test Certificate was issued by UL Solutions (Demko) and dated 2024-10-02.

entities.name: MPLUS ELECTRONICS CO LTD

entities.evidence: This CB Test Certificate is issued by the National Certification Body ... UL Solutions (Demko), Borupvang 5A DK-2750 Ballerup, DENMARK

entities.name: IECEE CB Scheme

The applicant, manufacturer, and factory are MPLUS ELECTRONICS CO LTD in the Republic of Korea.
